title: When subitem is done
excerpt: We need an automation for when my subitem is DONE, the item and subitem disappear from my own view, but the item and other subitems stay for other team members and their own view.

posts.author: Justyna (Justyna )
posts.cookedHtml: We need an automation for when my subitem is DONE, the item and subitem disappear from my own view, but the item and other subitems stay for other team members and their own view.
